title: kardomia odontocalyx
intro:
Kardomia odontocalyx, commonly known as New Zealand Knapweed, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Kardomia odontocalyx include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, which exhibit therapeutic actions such as inhibiting the growth of bacteria and reducing inflammation.
